title: Tax Return Basics
context: Self-employed hairdresser. Annual income: £28,000. Business expenses: £6,500. Personal allowance: £12,570. Basic rate tax: 20%.

questions.question: What is 'self-employed'?
options: Working for yourself, not a company
questions.answer: Working for yourself, not a company

questions.question: What are 'allowable expenses'?
options: Business costs you can deduct from taxable income
questions.answer: Business costs you can deduct from taxable income

questions.question: What is a 'tax return'?
options: A form declaring your income and expenses to HMRC
Money you get back from the government
questions.answer: A form declaring your income and expenses to HMRC
